2026-04-23T07:31:01.6917566Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-23T07:31:01.6918105Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-23T07:31:01.6918524Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-23T07:31:01.6918883Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-23T07:31:01.6919190Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-23T07:31:01.6919725Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-23T07:31:01.6919887Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-04-23T07:31:01.6920064Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-23T07:31:01.6920231Z [36;1m# Set outputs for next steps[0m
2026-04-23T07:31:01.6920462Z [36;1m{[0m

2026-04-23T07:31:01.6920946Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-04-23T07:31:01.6921200Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m

If omitted, the tool will attempt to resolve the target from the current workflow context (triggering issue, PR, or discussion). If auto-targeting fails (e.g., for schedule or workflow_dispatch triggers), the tool call will fail with an error.","type":["number","string"]},"reply_to_id":{"description":"Node ID of the discussion comment to reply to, enabling threaded discussion comments.
